meta.homeTitle: Aytek Chiller | Industrial Cooling Technology Leader Since 1983
meta.homeDescription: Aytek Cooling Systems — 7,000+ chiller installations, 140 production staff, exporting to 75+ countries since 1983. MASTERtech, NOVAtech, CHILLTECH and more.
meta.corporateDescription: Learn about Aytek Cooling Systems founded in 1983, our Design Center award, ISO 9001 certification and international offices.
meta.productsDescription: Aytek Chiller product catalog: MASTERtech, NOVAtech, BLOWtech, CO2TECH chiller systems and CHILLTECH, PULSETECH temperature control units.
meta.designCenterDescription: Turkey's 13th Design Center — 6 patented products: CO2TECH, CHILLTECH, PULSETECH, LABTECH, MULTITECH, THERMOTECH 180.
meta.referencesDescription: Aytek Chiller's 7,000+ successful installations across hospitals, food, plastics, automotive and many more sectors.
meta.exportDescription: Aytek Chiller exports to 75+ countries. International offices in Germany and UK, wide partner network in Americas, Europe, Africa and Asia.
meta.contactDescription: Contact Aytek Cooling Systems. Istanbul Arnavutköy headquarters, +90 212 549 11 99, info@aytekchillers.com

hero.title: Leader in Cooling Technology for 35+ Years
hero.subtitle: World-class industrial chiller and temperature control systems

home.cat1Desc: MASTERtech, NOVAtech, BLOWtech, FREEtech and CO2TECH — air-cooled chiller systems from 350 kW to 2500 kW.
home.cat2Desc: CHILLTECH, PULSETECH, LABTECH, MULTITECH and THERMOTECH 180 — precision temperature control units.
home.cat3Desc: Custom HVAC solutions for commercial facilities and industrial projects.
home.why1Desc: Turkey's 13th Ministry-approved Design Center. 6 registered patent products.
home.why2Desc: ISO 9001 quality management system audited by TÜV since 2013.
home.why3Desc: Over 7,000 cooling system installations and 10,000+ projects since 1983.
home.why4Desc: Exporting to Americas, Europe, Africa and Asia. Offices in Germany and UK.
home.ctaTitle: Get a Quote for Your Project
home.ctaSubtitle: Our expert engineering team creates custom solutions for your needs.

corporate.story1: Aytek Cooling Systems was founded in Istanbul in 1983 and has established itself as one of Turkey's leading manufacturers in industrial cooling technologies. Prioritizing engineering excellence and customer satisfaction since its founding, the company has become the industry's established brand with over 7,000 system installations and more than 10,000 project experiences.
corporate.story2: Operating in our 6,000 m² modern factory with 140 production staff, we continue our R&D activities within our own Design Center, developing new patented products every year. Our product portfolio from MASTERtech to CO2TECH is designed to meet the most demanding requirements of our customers.
corporate.story3: Bearing the title of Turkey's 13th Ministry-approved Design Center, Aytek also has a strong international position. Through its offices in Germany and the UK, exports to 75+ countries and 42 business partners, it carries Turkish engineering products to the world.
corporate.isoDesc: We hold the ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System certification audited by TÜV since 2013.
corporate.designDesc: This title granted by the Turkish Ministry of Industry and Technology is the official recognition of Aytek's R&D investments and patented products.
corporate.qualityDesc: Our quality policy aims to consistently exceed customer expectations; it is applied at every stage from raw material selection to final testing. Continuous improvement, employee development and technology investment are our core principles.

products.pageSubtitle: Industrial Cooling and Temperature Control Solutions

designCenter.intro: Aytek Cooling Systems has been registered as Turkey's 13th Design Center by the Turkish Ministry of Industry and Technology. This title is the official recognition of the company's commitment to R&D and its engineering expertise.
designCenter.ctaSubtitle: Contact our expert team for special engineering requirements beyond our standard products.

references.intro: Leading institutions and organizations operating throughout Turkey and worldwide are among Aytek's trusted customers.

export.intro: Aytek Cooling Systems exports its quality engineering products to more than 75 countries worldwide. With international offices in Germany and the UK and 42 business partners, it has a strong global network.
export.region1Desc: Exports to numerous countries in North and South America.
export.region2Desc: Strong presence in the European market through the Germany office.
export.region3Desc: Exports to growing markets across the African continent.
export.region4Desc: Wide customer network in the Middle East and Far East.
